title: Chaining Promises and Error Handling
description: Chain multiple async operations and handle errors with .catch().

slides.title: Chaining .then() Calls 🔗
Error Propagation with .catch() 🚨
Chain with Error
slides.content: Run this and see the error handling:

quizData.question: If a promise in a chain rejects, where does the error go?
quizData.explanation: Errors propagate down the chain until caught by a `.catch()`.
